zucchini-flute-recipe-comedera.name: Zucchini Flute Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 cdas de aceite de oliva (al gusto)

instructions: Remove the stem from the pumpkins and cut into small cubes. Reserve.
Pela los dientes de ajo y la cebolla, trocea en cuadritos. Haz lo mismo con el pimiento.
Warm up a frying pan with olive oil and spray the garlic by the onion till they clear.
Agrega el pimiento junto a las calabacitas. Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Meg and cook till evaporate the fluid that released pumpkins. The vegetables have to be soft.
Una vez lista, apaga y deja reposar.
Warm tortillas into another frying pan till they smooth.
Warm another frying pan with vegetable oil to fry the flutes.
Filling up tortillas and scrubbing them and pressuring them with some chopsticks to stop the pilling from coming out.
Fry the flutes till they are well golden.
Once ready, remove excess oil with absorbing paper and serve them with your favorite accompaniments.
